inputs: (especially when explaining the combo system), so it may be wise to
read another general moves FAQ so you know what I'm talking about.
Also, for an even MORE in-depth explanation of the combo system in
X-Men Vs. Street Fighter, I HIGHLY recommend reading James Chen's Combo
FAQ, currently available on the newsgroup alt.games.sf2,
ftp://brawl.mindlink.net and www.gamefaqs.com.
JOYSTICK     | .-----------Strong
U/B U U/F    | | |
D/B D D/F    O O O

movesList.name: QCT
inputs: = Quarter Circle Toward (roll the joystick from D to F)

movesList.name: QCB
inputs: = Quarter Circle Back (roll the joystick from D to B)

movesList.name: HCT
inputs: = Half Circle Toward (roll the joystick from B to D to F)

movesList.name: HCB
inputs: = Half Circle Back (roll the joystick from F to D to B)

movesList.name: OS
inputs: = Overhead Strike--CANNOT be blocked low

movesList.name: MSH
inputs: = Marvel Super Heroes

movesList.name: BB
inputs: = Berserker Barrage (Wolverine's move)

movesList.name: SBB
inputs: = Super Berserker Barrage (Wolverine's move)

movesList.name: OTG
inputs: = Off the Ground

movesList.name: DP
inputs: = Dragon Punch or similiar joystick motion (F, D, D/F)

movesList.name: HK
inputs: = Hurricane Kick or similiar joystick motion (QCB)

movesList.name: SC
inputs: = Super Combo

movesList.name: FK
inputs: = Flash Kick or similiar joystick motion (charge D, U)

movesList.name: SB
inputs: = Sonic Boom or similiar joystick motion (charge B, F)

movesList.name: YF
inputs: = Yoga Flame or similiar joystick motion (HCT)

movesList.name: SBK
inputs: = Spinning Bird Kick

movesList.name: SPD
inputs: = Spinning Pileriver or similiar motion (roll 360 degrees)
OR, Sabretooth jumps onto the screen, rears back with a yell
and shreds his coat off
